da.hero_subtitle: Lær stabile backbends uden at klemme lænden. Vi bygger styrke i bagsiden, åbner skuldre og hofter, og arbejder trin-for-trin.
da.overview_subtitle: Vores Backbend Kursus er et 4-ugers forløb med 8 × 90-minutters workshops, hvor du gradvist lærer at arbejde sikkert og effektivt med backbends. Vi kombinerer teknik, styrke og mobilitet, så du kan åbne forsiden af kroppen uden at overbelaste lænd, skuldre eller nakke.
da.feat1_desc: Rygsøjle, skulderbælte, hofter og core. Vi starter med at forstå din rygs naturlige bevægelse.
da.feat2_desc: Aktiv ryg- og skulderstyrke, bækkenkontrol og sikre overgange. Styrkebaseret backbends.
da.feat3_desc: Dybere backbends, drop-backs og flydende overgange ind og ud af backbends for den øvede.
da.feat4_desc: Én workshop i hot-salen for at blødgøre rygsøjlen + én ikke-opvarmet for teknik og styrke.
da.feat5_desc: Du behøver ikke kunne dybe backbends for at starte. Vi guider dig trin for trin med styrke og mobilitet.
da.feat6_desc: Fokus på Cobra, Camel, Wheel og mere. Altid med tydelige modstillinger og pauser undervejs.
da.schedule_card1_item1: Grundig opvarmning af skuldre, hofter, core og rygsøjle
da.schedule_card1_item2: Teknik-drills for sikker extension og stabilisering
da.schedule_card1_item3: Progressioner fra blide bagoverbøjninger til dybere variationer
da.schedule_card2_item2: Træning i at skelne mellem 'godt stræk' og overbelastning
da.schedule_card2_item3: Core, ben og skuldre styrkes så rygsøjlen støttes
da.invest_item2: ✓ Blanding af hot og non-heated sessions
da.faq1_q: Skal jeg allerede kunne dybe backbends for at deltage?
da.faq1_a: Nej — kurset er designet til alle, der vil arbejde seriøst med backbends, uanset udgangspunkt. Du bliver guidet trin for trin.
da.faq2_q: Er det bedre at tage hele forløbet eller bare enkelte workshops som drop-in?
da.faq2_a: Hele forløbet giver den mest tydelige progression. Prisen pr. workshop er også lavere ved fuld tilmelding. Hver session fungerer dog også som en selvstændig workshop.
da.faq3_q: Er det sikkert for ryggen at arbejde så meget med backbends?
da.faq3_a: Ja — når det gøres med korrekt teknik. Vi arbejder styrkebaseret med fokus på core, ben og skuldre, så rygsøjlen bliver støttet i stedet for presset.
da.faq4_q: Hvad hvis jeg har tidligere skader i ryg, skuldre eller hofter?
da.faq4_a: Fortæl altid underviseren om eventuelle skader. Vi arbejder med gradvis opbygning, mange variationer og tydelige alternativer.
da.faq5_q: Er kurset kun for elever — eller også for yogalærere?
da.faq5_a: Kurset er både for dedikerede yogaelever og undervisere. Undervisere får inspiration til sekvenser og cues. Elever får struktureret træning til egen praksis.
da.cta_title: Klar til at åbne ryggen sikkert?
da.cta_text: Tilmeld dig det næste hold eller se vores kursuspakker.

en.hero_subtitle: Learn stable backbends without compressing the lower back. We build strength in the posterior chain, open shoulders and hips, and work step by step.
en.overview_subtitle: Our Backbends Course is a 4-week programme with 8 × 90-minute workshops where you gradually learn to work safely and effectively with backbends. We combine technique, strength and mobility so you can open the front of your body without overloading the lower back, shoulders or neck.
en.feat1_desc: Spine, shoulder girdle, hips and core. We start by understanding your back’s natural movement.
en.feat2_desc: Active back and shoulder strength, pelvic control and safe transitions. Strength-based backbends.
en.feat3_desc: Deeper backbends, drop-backs and fluid transitions in and out of backbends for the experienced practitioner.
en.feat4_desc: One workshop in the hot room to soften the spine + one non-heated for technique and strength.
en.feat5_desc: You don’t need to be able to do deep backbends to start. We guide you step by step with strength and mobility.
en.feat6_desc: Focus on Cobra, Camel, Wheel and more. Always with clear counter-poses and rest breaks along the way.
en.schedule_card1_item1: Thorough warm-up of shoulders, hips, core and spine
en.schedule_card1_item2: Technique drills for safe extension and stabilisation
en.schedule_card1_item3: Progressions from gentle backbends to deeper variations
en.schedule_card2_item1: Cool-down, counter-poses and nervous system regulation
en.schedule_card2_item2: Training to distinguish between a ‘good stretch’ and overload
en.schedule_card2_item3: Core, legs and shoulders are strengthened to support the spine
en.invest_item2: ✓ Mix of hot and non-heated sessions
en.invest_item4: ✓ Access to changing rooms and showers
en.faq1_q: Do I need to be able to do deep backbends to participate?
en.faq1_a: No — the course is designed for anyone who wants to work seriously with backbends, regardless of starting point. You’ll be guided step by step.
en.faq2_q: Is it better to take the full programme or just individual workshops as drop-in?
en.faq2_a: The full programme gives the clearest progression. The per-workshop price is also lower with full enrolment. However, each session also works as a standalone workshop.
en.faq3_q: Is it safe for the back to work so much with backbends?
en.faq3_a: Yes — when done with correct technique. We work strength-based with a focus on core, legs and shoulders, so the spine is supported rather than compressed.
en.faq4_q: What if I have previous injuries in my back, shoulders or hips?
en.faq4_a: Always inform the instructor about any injuries. We work with gradual progression, many variations and clear alternatives.
en.faq5_q: Is the course only for students — or also for yoga teachers?
en.faq5_a: The course is for both dedicated yoga students and teachers. Teachers gain inspiration for sequences and cues. Students get structured training for their own practice.
en.cta_title: Ready to open your back safely?
en.cta_text: Sign up for the next group or explore our course bundles.
